name: query_execute
description: Execute an FQL (Fauna Query Language) query against your database. Supports reads, writes, aggregations, joins, and complex logic in a single request.

parameters.name: arguments
parameters.description: Named arguments to pass into the query as variables.

parameters.name: X-Format
parameters.description: Response format header. Use 'tagged' for typed results or 'simple' for plain JSON.

parameters.name: X-Typecheck
parameters.description: Enable static type checking for the query.

parameters.name: X-Linearized
parameters.description: Enable strictly serialized reads for the query.

parameters.name: X-Query-Timeout-Ms
parameters.description: Maximum query execution time in milliseconds.
